capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a container management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise has a container management service.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise container management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the container management service reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the container management service is reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular container management service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the Container Management?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether KPIs and KRIs for container management are formalized and documented.
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for container management

questions.prompt: Are the KPIs and KRIs for the Container Management reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether container management KPIs and KRIs are reviewed at least quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular KPI/KRI review

capability_questions.capability_name: Container testing, development and deployment policies

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have enterprise-wide container management and lifecycle policies?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether enterprise-wide container management and lifecycle policies exist.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide container management and lifecycle policies

questions.prompt: Does the container management policy apply enterprise wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether container management policy applies enterprise-wide.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide policy application

questions.prompt: Are the container management policies reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether container management policies are reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular container management policy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy a container management software that manages the container infrastructure?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether container management software manages container infrastructure.
questions.evaluation_focus: Container management software for container infrastructure

questions.prompt: Does the container management software belong to a specific enterprise or is there an orchestrator deployed to manage containers of various types?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a single-vendor or multi-type orchestrator manages containers.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-specific or multi-type orchestrator deployment

questions.prompt: Does the container management and orchestration solution have capabilities to automate container lifecycle?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether container lifecycle is automated by management and orchestration.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated container lifecycle management

questions.prompt: Does the container management and orchestration configuration get reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether container management and orchestration configuration is reviewed at least quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular container management and orchestration configuration review

questions.prompt: Does the container management platform integrate with broader asset management, vulnerability management, and compliance management systems to provide efficient handling of container assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the container platform integrates with asset, vulnerability, and compliance systems.
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with asset, vulnerability, and compliance management systems

questions.prompt: Does the organization verify container image provenance and block deployment of images from untrusted registries or with known supply chain risk?
questions.intent: Evaluate container image provenance and supply chain controls
questions.evaluation_focus: Container image provenance and supply chain verification

questions.prompt: Does the container management system have capability to perform efficient resource management based on container management policies in the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the container management system performs efficient resource management based on policies.
questions.evaluation_focus: Efficient resource management based on container policies

questions.prompt: Do resource management best practices get deployed only for critical container applications or for all containers?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether resource management applies to all containers or only critical applications.
questions.evaluation_focus: Resource management scope for all or critical containers

questions.prompt: Are resource management practices for containers deployed automatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether container resource management practices are deployed automatically.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated resource management practices

questions.prompt: Does the container management solution have capability to deploy function specific security for specific container systems?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether function-specific security is deployed for container systems.
questions.evaluation_focus: Function-specific security for container systems

questions.prompt: Is container security deployed for the entire container ecosystem or only for specific container vendors?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether container security covers the entire ecosystem or specific vendors only.
questions.evaluation_focus: Container security scope across ecosystem or specific vendors

questions.prompt: Is the container security deployment automated in response to compromises, performance, policy, environment, etc.?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether container security deployment is automated in response to events.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated container security deployment

questions.prompt: Are container security practices reviewed at least quarterly to measure efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether container security practices are reviewed at least quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular container security practice review

questions.prompt: Are container security features deployed natively or integrated with external security providers?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether container security is native or integrated with external providers.
questions.evaluation_focus: Native or externally integrated container security features
